scene_title: A beira da guerra de Gog
narrative_beat: Figura caminhando sobre linha do deserto

style_reference.textual_description: dark cinematic chiaroscuro, Caravaggio-inspired, foreground in rich warm tones (crimson, amber, gold) with background in desaturated black-and-white, film grain, candlelight, floating orange embers

subject.primary: a wide panoramic of a line drawn across desert sand, one side monochrome modern world, other side crimson-gold prophetic vision
subject.focal_point: a solitary hooded figure walking on the exact line
subject.secondary: Embers fall on the crimson side; stillness on the mono side

composition.foreground: figure and crimson side in vivid ochre-crimson-gold

style.post_processing: halation, crushed blacks, crimson-ochre saturation, anamorphic flare

symbolism.primary: walker on the threshold of prophecy

negative_as_positive: clean frame without visible text or watermarks
photorealistic documentary cinematography, not illustrated or cartoon
analog film photography aesthetic, no digital art flatness
muted desaturated background palette, warm saturated foreground only

multimodal_inputs.instruction: Transfer color palette, lighting, grain, atmosphere only. Do not copy composition.
